decision.reason: No current cut slot is seed-safe. Public Lorehold pressure evidence supports further pressure modeling, but the active 607 evidence classifies the available slots as hard-blocked, same-lane-only, or requiring more cut-safety evidence.

external_learning.learning: Public pressure payoffs such as Guttersnipe, Young Pyromancer, and Monastery Mentor support pressure experiments, but they do not name a safe cut from the protected miracle shell.
The optimized public lane is tagged around Topdeck, Spellslinger, Combo, and Discard, so pressure belongs inside the topdeck plan rather than as a blind cross-lane swap.

External guide material frames ramp, big instants/sorceries, topdeck manipulation, and Library of Leng style timing as the deck's engine. That supports protecting ramp, miracle spells, and topdeck setup.

pressure_findings.interpretation: Pressure adds have real signal, but 607 currently has no seed-safe or same-lane pressure-payoff cut. A Guttersnipe/Young Pyromancer package is therefore a full-shell hypothesis, not a one-for-one promotion gate.
